name: Pam's Shrimp Etouffee
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh or frozen shrimp, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
Thaw shrimp if frozen. In a large saucepan cook onion, celery, green pepper, and garlic, covered, in cooking oil for 10 minutes or until tender.
Add butter; stir until melted. Stir in cornstarch. Add tomato sauce, water, salt, ground peppers, Cajun seasoning, basil, oregano, thyme, bay leaf, and tabasco sauce. Squeeze lemon juice into the pot, then add a piece of lemon as well. Cook and stir until bubbly.
Add shrimp. Return to boiling; reduce heat. Simmer, uncovered, for 4-5 minutes or until shrimp turns pink. Adjust seasonings to taste. Serve over fluffy white rice.
